summary: GH-92 implementation is approved for PR review. Scope is limited to the in-process Snapshot/RefMap/Evidence refs slice in `packages/runtime-api`, GH-92 item-specific carriers, and Core-facing refs/summary readback for #86/#92-#96.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-92 working tree passed `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, `pnpm smoke:runtime:local`, `git diff --check`, JSON readability, `loom doctor`, `loom verify`, `loom suite validate --item GH-92`, `loom suite carrier validate --item GH-92`, `loom suite evidence validate --item GH-92`, and `loom fact-chain`; `loom build` is blocked by installed CLI path consumption for repo-local `tools/loom.py`, while the required global suite/carrier/evidence surfaces passed separately.
follow_ups: Re-review if this PR changes public page-scene ref shapes, unavailable classification values, evidence metadata semantics, retention/redaction behavior, runtime session lifecycle behavior, or PR head content beyond carrier-only review metadata.

This approval does not cover persistent SQLite evidence storage, raw DOM/HAR/request/response/screenshot/video capture, production payloads, real account/session data, Viewer/handoff/Core-App owner facts, hosted browser, provider marketplace, anti-detection success claims, raw CDP/VNC/WebSocket endpoint exposure, or cross-repo Core/App changes.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation adds opaque page-scene refs, evidence provenance/policy records, structured unavailable states, Core-facing refs/summary readback, and focused tests/smoke without exposing raw browser/session artifacts or provider-specific secrets.
